title: Libertas - Weekly Digests
description: Weekly summaries of freedom technology developments

items.title: Weekly Digest: 2026-03-28 to 2026-04-03
items.summary: 2025 shattered records with 313 internet shutdowns across 52 countries—zero days without blackouts. Governments evolved from crude blocking to sophisticated platform control, while new surveillance tools target VPN users and AI safety guardrails. Two project ideas emerged for identity compartmentalization and surveillance accountability.
items.content_text: 2025 shattered records with 313 internet shutdowns across 52 countries—zero days without blackouts. Governments evolved from crude blocking to sophisticated platform control, while new surveillance tools target VPN users and AI safety guardrails. Two project ideas emerged for identity compartmentalization and surveillance accountability.

items.title: Weekly Digest: 2026-04-25 to 2026-05-01
items.summary: This week revealed a coordinated global assault on digital freedom: age verification laws expanding across platforms and governments threaten to end anonymous internet use, while 30 governments deployed transnational repression and systematic financial censorship by payment platforms documented new forms of control. Freedom tech organizations pushed back with enhanced censorship measurement tools and legal challenges.
items.content_text: This week revealed a coordinated global assault on digital freedom: age verification laws expanding across platforms and governments threaten to end anonymous internet use, while 30 governments deployed transnational repression and systematic financial censorship by payment platforms documented new forms of control. Freedom tech organizations pushed back with enhanced censorship measurement tools and legal challenges.
